name: textarea-auto-resize
visual_summary: A textarea component that automatically resizes to fit the content. It would be used when a large amount of text needs to be input, where a fixed height textarea may be inconvenient.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: textarea-auto-resize
Description: A textarea component that automatically resizes to fit the content. It would be used when a large amount of text needs to be input, where a fixed height textarea may be inconvenient.
Style: neumorphism
Interactions: responsive
Tags: textarea, auto-resize

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// elements/textarea-auto-resize.html
<div class="w-full max-w-xs mx-auto">
    <textarea x-data="{ 
                resize () { 
                    $el.style.height = '0px'; 
                    $el.style.height = $el.scrollHeight + 'px' 
                } 
            }"
            x-init="resize()"
            @input="resize()"
            type="text" 
            placeholder="Type your message here. I will resize based on the height content." 
            class="flex w-full h-auto min-h-[8
